name: Prerna
introCommands: git commit -m "lost to a chartered accountant"
taglinePhrases: carries quiet grace that stops rooms.
balances worlds without breaking a sweat.
walks in and rewrites every equation.
description: Future Chartered Accountant — the kind of person who commands respect in a boardroom and steals your composure with a single glance. Sharp mind, sharper instincts, and a presence that makes you forget what you were about to say.
greeting: this has been in my heart's cache for a while ✨

terminal.secretLine1: confession = "the thing I never said out loud";

message: Some people walk into your life and rearrange every priority you thought you had. You did that — without trying, without knowing, without permission.
from: — from someone still learning how to say your name without smiling
hint: each one holds something I never said out loud
notes: you carry yourself like someone who already knows her worth — and it's magnetic
I rehearsed saying hi forty-seven times and still almost forgot how words work
you walked in and even my playlist switched to love songs on its own
the way you focus when you work — I could watch that quiet intensity forever
my friends are tired of hearing about you, but I physically cannot stop
you make ambition look graceful and I haven't recovered since
